name: the-job
description: The Job — offline co-op heist party game. GM-facing SPA (React + Vite + TS).

scripts.comment:gates: check:full, sim:check and content:validate start as no-op stubs so the pipeline can bootstrap. Epic E0 replaces check:full; E1 replaces sim:check; E7/E10 replace content:validate. Do NOT leave them as stubs once the relevant epic lands.
scripts.check: echo 'stub: fast gate (type+lint+unit). E0.6 wires this.' && exit 0
scripts.check:full: echo 'stub: full gate. E0.6 wires this (type+lint+unit+sensors).' && exit 0
scripts.sim:check: echo 'stub: balance harness. E1 wires this (Monte Carlo asserts design targets).' && exit 0
scripts.content:validate: echo 'stub: preset/content schema validation. E7/E10 wire this.' && exit 0
